title: Cactus halei
taxonomy: Cactus halei is classified under the family Mammillaria, which is a group of small to medium-sized cacti commonly known as the pincushion cacti. This family is further classified under the subfamily Mammilloideae and the order Caryophyllales. The classification reflects the cactus's physical characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants. Mammillaria species are native to the Americas, and they are often found in dry, rocky areas. The family Mammillaria is one of the largest and most diverse groups of cacti, with many species still to be discovered and studied.
